weak_aliases.reason: Useful for search, not merge authority.
Useful for search, not merge authority.

suggested_rules: Corridor records with identical corridor_name and identical route sets from different editions of the same planning document series (e.g., Final Plan and Final Plan Addendum) should be merged as they represent the same physical corridor at different stages (proposed vs. completed).
rationale: Both records describe the 'Pelham Bay Park Station Area' corridor with identical route sets (Bx5, Bx12, Bx12 SBS, Bx23, Bx24, Bx29, Q50 LTD). Record 1 (from the 2021 addendum) provides street limits 'Westchester Avenue / Wilkinson Avenue' and status 'Completed 2020', while Record 2 (from the 2019 Final Plan) provides corridor length (0.1 miles) and ridership (63,000). They share the identity key 'corridor_pelham-bay-park-station-area' and Record 2 lists 'corridor_pelham-bay-park-station-area' as an alias. The 2019 plan describes the proposed corridor at Pelham Bay Park 6 Station, and the 2021 addendum reports it as an implemented bus priority corridor. Source evidence confirms both refer to the same station-area bus priority corridor in the Bronx.
